hooks.command: python -c "import sys,json,subprocess; from pathlib import Path; cwd=Path('.').resolve(); root=next((p for p in [cwd]+list(cwd.parents) if (p/'.claude').exists()),cwd); data=sys.stdin.buffer.read(); link=root/'.agent'/'config'/'motor_destination_link.json'; d=json.loads(link.read_text(encoding='utf-8')) if link.exists() else {}; c=(Path(d['motor_root'])/'.agent'/'hooks'/'guard_paths.py') if d.get('motor_root') else None; g=c if (c and c.exists()) else None; sys.exit(subprocess.run([sys.executable,str(g)],input=data,cwd=str(root)).returncode) if g else (sys.stderr.write('SECURITY HOOK INACTIVE: motor link or guard_paths.py not resolved; write blocked (fail-closed). Run install --sync from repo_motor.'),sys.exit(2))"
